items.name: Samosa (2 pcs)
items.description: Spicy potatoes and green peas in homemade pastry served with chutney.

items.name: Paneer Chili
items.description: Chunks of fried cottage cheese marinated & cooked in a spicy sauce.

items.name: Alu Ko Achar
items.description: Boiled potatoes, cucumber and carrots marinated with fresh lemon, chopped green chili and spices (served cold).

items.name: Bhatamas Sandheko
items.description: Roasted soybeans marinated with spices and garnished with coriander leaves

items.name: Chau-Chau Sandheko (V)
items.description: Crispy Wai-Wai noodles marinated with spices and garnished with coriander leaves.

items.name: Chatpatt
items.description: Puffed rice marinated with spices and garnished with coriander leaves.

items.name: Chips Chili
items.description: Deep-fried potato chips marinated in a spicy sauce with capsicums and tomatoes.

items.name: Pani Puri (8 pcs)
items.description: Crispy hollow dough balls filled with tangy and spicy chutney.

items.name: Chicken Pakora (4 pcs)
items.description: Sliced onion and chicken dipped in chickpea flour and deep fried (served with mint chutney).

items.name: Pakora Veg
items.description: Sliced onion and vegetables dipped in chickpea flour and deep fried (served with mint chutney).

items.name: Chili Chicken
items.description: Marinated diced chicken tossed in a spicy sauce.

items.name: Sausage Chilli
items.description: Grilled marinated chicken sausage tossed in a spicy sauce.

items.name: Buff chili
items.description: Grilled marinated buff meat tossed in a spicy sauce.

items.name: Sausage Fry
items.description: Grilled chicken sausage tossed in Nepali spices.

items.name: Chicken Lollipop (4pcs)
items.description: Deep-fried chicken lollipops marinated with Nepalese spices, served with tomato sauce.

items.name: Khasi ko Bhutan
items.description: Boiled then pan-fried goat/lamb meat (stomach, intestine, liver) with Nepali spices.

items.name: Choyla
items.description: Tandoor oven-cooked boneless goat/chicken/buff pieces marinated with Himalayan herbs and spices (served cold).

items.name: Sekuwa
items.description: Tender boneless chicken/goat pieces marinated in our Chef's special spice and barbequed.

items.name: Sekuwa Set
items.description: Tender boneless goat/chicken pieces marinated in our Chef's special spice and barbequed. Served with beaten rice, soybeans, tomato chutney, green salad and Alu ko Achar.

items.name: Choyla Set
items.description: Tandoor oven-cooked boneless chicken/lamb/buff pieces marinated with Himalayan herbs and spices, served cold with beaten rice, soybeans, tomato chutney, green salad and Alu ko Achar.

items.name: Veg Choyla Set
items.description: Vegetarian nuggets boiled & marinated with Himalayan herbs and spices, served cold with beaten rice, soybeans, tomato chutney, green salad and Alu Ko Achar.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Noodles stir-fried with julienned vegetables and Nepali spices, garnished with coriander leaves.

items.name: Buffet (All you can eat)
items.description: Time: 11:30 am to 2:30 pm. Rice, Goat curry, Chicken curry, Mix veg curry, Paneer curry, Daal, Salad, Tomato Chutney, Papad.

items.name: Steamed Momo (10pcs)
items.description: Typical Nepali dumplings made of spiced filling wrapped in dough, steamed or fried and served with our special homemade chutney.

items.name: Jhol Momo (10pcs)
items.description: Typical Nepali dumplings made of spiced filling wrapped in dough, served in a hot and spicy tomato sesame flavoured soup (chutney).

items.name: Chilli Momo (10pcs)
items.description: Deep-fried and tossed with diced capsicums, onions, herbs in spicy tomato sauce.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Rice stir-fried with vegetables and Nepali spices.

items.name: Dhal Tadka
items.description: Yellow lentils slow-cooked with Nepali spices.

items.name: Mixed Veg Curry
items.description: Seasonal fresh vegetables cooked in traditional Nepali style.

items.name: Chicken Curry
items.description: Bone-in chicken slow cooked according to traditional Nepali recipe.

items.name: Goat Curry
items.description: Bone-in goat meat slowly cooked according to traditional Nepali recipe.

items.name: Nepali Thali
items.description: A typical Nepali thali set with rice, dhal, 3 serve of curry (veg or meat depending), pickle (achar), saag, Alu ko Achar, tomato chutney, papad, green salad and yoghurt.

items.name: Gulab Jamun
items.description: Sweet deep-fried dough balls rested in a spiced sugar syrup.

items.name: Pista Kulfi
items.description: Creamy spiced pistachio-flavoured dense ice cream.

items.name: Mango Kulfi
items.description: Creamy spiced mango-flavoured dense ice cream.
